name_en: 🆕 M47199 Dynamic Code Top-tier Original OnTheGo Small Handbag from the collaboration series between the brand and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, featuring cute duck motifs on the glossy calfskin and a deep microfiber lining echoing the original background. The top handle and detachable, adjustable shoulder strap complete the look.
name_cn:
🆕 M47199 Dynamic Code Top-tier Original OnTheGo Small Handbag from the collaboration series between the brand and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, featuring cute duck motifs on the glossy calfskin and a deep microfiber lining echoing the original background. The top handle and detachable, adjustable shoulder strap complete the look.
	•	Monogram Reverse coated canvas with calfskin trim
	•	Calfskin
	•	Microfiber lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Smooth calfskin trim
	•	Hook closure
	•	Spacious capacity
	•	Zippered interior pocket
	•	Glossy calfskin trim
	•	Shoulder strap: detachable, adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 35.2 cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 53.0 cm
	•	Handle: double handle
